Diapres

comment_lines: The rhythm is paced with a demand pacemaker.  The PVCs are multiform.
header_metadata.comment_text: Digoxin The rhythm is paced with a demand pacemaker.  The PVCs are multiform.
-1 M 742 654 x1 Diapres, Xyloprim

comment_lines: The rate of paced rhythm is close to that of the underlying sinus rhythm,
resulting in many pacemaker fusion beats.  The PVCs are multiform.  Several
bursts of muscle noise occur, but the signals are generally of good quality.
header_metadata.comment_text: Digoxin, Pronestyl The rate of paced rhythm is close to that of the underlying sinus rhythm, resulting in many pacemaker fusion beats.  The PVCs are multiform.  Several bursts of muscle noise occur, but the signals are generally of good quality.

comment_lines: The PVCs are uniform.  The predominant feature of this tape is
header_metadata.comment_text: Digoxin, Nitropaste, Pronestyl The PVCs are uniform.  The predominant feature of this tape is high-grade noise and artifact.
Inderal The PVCs are multiform.

comment_lines: Complete heart block is present. The PVCs are multiform.
header_metadata.comment_text: Digoxin Complete heart block is present. The PVCs are multiform.

comment_lines: There is borderline first degree AV block and sinus arrhythmia.  The
PVCs are multiform.  The lower channel exhibits considerable noise and
header_metadata.comment_text: Digoxin, Quinaglute There is borderline first degree AV block and sinus arrhythmia.  The PVCs are multiform.  The lower channel exhibits considerable noise and baseline shifts.

comment_lines: There is first degree AV block.  The PVCs are multiform.
header_metadata.comment_text: Quinidine There is first degree AV block.  The PVCs are multiform.

comment_lines: There is first degree AV block.  There are short bursts of both baseline
shifts and muscle noise, but in general, the quality is excellent.
header_metadata.comment_text: Digoxin, Lasix There is first degree AV block.  There are short bursts of both baseline shifts and muscle noise, but in general, the quality is excellent.

comment_lines: There is S-T segment depression in the upper channel.
header_metadata.comment_text: Digoxin, Pronestyl There is S-T segment depression in the upper channel.

comment_lines: The variation in the rate of normal sinus rhythm is possibly due to a
header_metadata.comment_text: None The variation in the rate of normal sinus rhythm is possibly due to a wandering atrial pacemaker.

comment_lines: The lower channel has low-amplitude high-frequency noise throughout.
header_metadata.comment_text: Digoxin, Lasix, Pronestyl The lower channel has low-amplitude high-frequency noise throughout.

comment_lines: The PVCs are uniform and interpolated.
header_metadata.comment_text: Digoxin, Inderal The PVCs are uniform and interpolated.

comment_lines: The PVCs are multiform.  The junctional escape beats follow PVCs.
header_metadata.comment_text: Digoxin, Isordil, Quinidine The PVCs are multiform.  The junctional escape beats follow PVCs.

comment_lines: The PVCs are multiform.  There are occasional bursts of high-frequency
noise in the upper channel, and severe noise and artifact in the lower
header_metadata.comment_text: Digoxin, Quinidine The PVCs are multiform.  There are occasional bursts of high-frequency noise in the upper channel, and severe noise and artifact in the lower channel.

comment_lines: The PVCs are uniform and late-cycle.  Junctional escape beats occur following
header_metadata.comment_text: Digoxin, Hydrochlorthiazide, Inderal, KCl The PVCs are uniform and late-cycle.  Junctional escape beats occur following episodes of ventricular trigeminy.

comment_lines: The PVCs are uniform and late-cycle.  This record was taken from the same
header_metadata.comment_text: Digoxin, Hydrochlorthiazide, Inderal, KCl The PVCs are uniform and late-cycle.  This record was taken from the same analog tape as record 201.

comment_lines: The PVCs are multiform.  There are QRS morphology changes in the upper
channel due to axis shifts.  There is considerable noise in both channels,
including muscle artifact and baseline shifts.  This is a very difficult
header_metadata.comment_text: Coumadin, Digoxin, Heparin, Hygroton, Lasix The PVCs are multiform.  There are QRS morphology changes in the upper channel due to axis shifts.  There is considerable noise in both channels, including muscle artifact and baseline shifts.  This is a very difficult record, even for humans!

comment_lines: The PVCs are of two forms, one of which is much more common than the other.
header_metadata.comment_text: Digoxin, Quinaglute The PVCs are of two forms, one of which is much more common than the other.

comment_lines: This is an extremely difficult record.  The predominant rhythm is normal
sinus with first degree AV block and left bundle branch block.  There are
periods when the conduction block changes to a right bundle branch block
pattern.  The PVCs are multiform.  Idioventricular rhythm appears following
the longest episode of ventricular flutter.  The record ends during the
header_metadata.comment_text: Digoxin, Quinaglute This is an extremely difficult record.  The predominant rhythm is normal sinus with first degree AV block and left bundle branch block.  There are periods when the conduction block changes to a right bundle branch block pattern.  The PVCs are multiform.  Idioventricular rhythm appears following the longest episode of ventricular flutter.  The record ends during the episode of SVTA.

comment_lines: The PVCs are uniform.  The couplets, many of which include a fusion PVC, are
often seen in a bigeminal pattern.   The triplets each consist of two
header_metadata.comment_text: None The PVCs are uniform.  The couplets, many of which include a fusion PVC, are often seen in a bigeminal pattern.   The triplets each consist of two PVCs and a fusion PVC.
Aldomet, Hydrodiuril, Inderal
None The PVCs are multiform.

comment_lines: There is rate-related right bundle branch block which appears when the heart
header_metadata.comment_text: None There is rate-related right bundle branch block which appears when the heart rate exceeds approximately 90 bpm.

comment_lines: The PVCs are multiform and usually late-cycle, frequently resulting in
fusion PVCs.  The morphology of the fusion PVCs varies from almost normal
to almost identical to that of the PVCs.
header_metadata.comment_text: Digoxin The PVCs are multiform and usually late-cycle, frequently resulting in fusion PVCs.  The morphology of the fusion PVCs varies from almost normal to almost identical to that of the PVCs.

comment_lines: The PVCs are multiform.  There are two episodes of artifactual amplitude
decrease and one occurrence of tape slippage.
header_metadata.comment_text: Digoxin, Dilantin The PVCs are multiform.  There are two episodes of artifactual amplitude decrease and one occurrence of tape slippage.

comment_lines: The PVCs are multiform.  There are two very short occurrences of tape slippage
(each less than one second in duration).
header_metadata.comment_text: None The PVCs are multiform.  There are two very short occurrences of tape slippage (each less than one second in duration).
Digoxin, Lasix, Quinidine The PVCs are multiform.

comment_lines: Following some conversions from atrial fibrillation to normal sinus
rhythm are pauses up to 3 seconds in duration.  The PVCs are multiform.
header_metadata.comment_text: -1 M 978 654 x1 Digoxin Following some conversions from atrial fibrillation to normal sinus rhythm are pauses up to 3 seconds in duration.  The PVCs are multiform.
Digoxin

comment_lines: The PVCs are multiform, but one form is much more common than the others.
header_metadata.comment_text: Hydrochlorthiazide, Lasix The PVCs are multiform, but one form is much more common than the others.

comment_lines: The episodes of paroxysmal atrial flutter/fibrillation are usually
followed by nodal escape beats.  There are several intervals of
header_metadata.comment_text: Digoxin, Quinidine The episodes of paroxysmal atrial flutter/fibrillation are usually followed by nodal escape beats.  There are several intervals of high-frequency noise/artifact in both channels.

comment_lines: The PVCs are multiform.  The two longest episodes of ventricular tachycardia
are slow (100 to 105 bpm) and bidirectional.
header_metadata.comment_text: None The PVCs are multiform.  The two longest episodes of ventricular tachycardia are slow (100 to 105 bpm) and bidirectional.

comment_lines: There is first degree AV block.  The PVCs are multiform.  There are
three short occurrences of tape slippage with a maximum duration of 2.2
header_metadata.comment_text: Digoxin, Norpace There is first degree AV block.  The PVCs are multiform.  There are three short occurrences of tape slippage with a maximum duration of 2.2 seconds.
Dilantin

comment_lines: AV conduction is quite abnormal with periods of 2:1 AV block, examples
of Mobitz II block, and right bundle branch block which appears to be
rate-related.  The couplet is probably ventricular.
header_metadata.comment_text: None AV conduction is quite abnormal with periods of 2:1 AV block, examples of Mobitz II block, and right bundle branch block which appears to be rate-related.  The couplet is probably ventricular.

comment_lines: The rhythm is compatible with sick sinus syndrome.  There is underlying
sinus bradycardia, first degree AV block, and frequent ectopic atrial runs
at rates of 80 to 90 bpm.  There are numerous long pauses up to 6 seconds
header_metadata.comment_text: Aldomet, Inderal The rhythm is compatible with sick sinus syndrome.  There is underlying sinus bradycardia, first degree AV block, and frequent ectopic atrial runs at rates of 80 to 90 bpm.  There are numerous long pauses up to 6 seconds in duration.
Dilantin The PVCs are multiform.
None The PVCs are uniform.
